dynamic_members.label: Dynamic group members
dynamic_members.description: Allow members to (temporarily) join/leave the group dynamically, so the group more or less behaves the same as manually syncing players together, with the main difference being that the group player will hold the queue.

dsp.disabled_message: DSP is currently disabled. Enable it using the switch above

parametric_eq.edited_channel: Plot the EQs response for this channel(s)
parametric_eq.channel: This band will be applied to

presets.name: Preset Name

dsp_note_multi_device_group.label: You can configure the DSP for each player individually.

dsp_note_multi_device_group_unsupported.label: This group type does not support DSP when playing to multiple devices.

settings.add_group_player_desc_universal:
By creating a Universal Player Group, you can group players from different providers/ecosystems together. 
This will distribute the same audio to all member players (but not in sync).

force_mobile_layout.label: Force mobile layout
force_mobile_layout.description: Force the mobile layout (with the menu-navigation at the bottom), even on larger screens.

settings.providers_description: Manage your music sources, player providers and plugins

settings.users_description: Manage user accounts, roles, and permissions
settings.system_description: Configure Music Assistant server settings and core modules

settings.remote_access_description: Securely access Music Assistant from anywhere
settings.remote_access_explanation_intro: Remote Access allows you to securely connect to your Music Assistant server from anywhere in the world.
settings.remote_access_explanation_ha_cloud: For the best experience and reliability, a Home Assistant Cloud subscription is required.
settings.remote_access_feature_webrtc: Based on WebRTC technology for peer-to-peer connections
settings.remote_access_feature_encrypted: End-to-end encrypted - your data stays private
settings.remote_access_feature_no_port_forwarding: No port forwarding or VPN required
settings.remote_access_mode_optimized_description: Using STUN/TURN servers from Home Assistant Cloud for optimal performance. Works reliably in all network configurations.
settings.remote_access_mode_basic_description: Using public STUN servers. This may not work in complex network setups. Upgrade to Home Assistant Cloud for the best experience.
settings.remote_access_id_explanation: Use this unique ID to connect to your Music Assistant server from remote devices:
settings.remote_access_step_2: Enter your Remote Access ID when prompted
settings.remote_access_step_3: Connect and enjoy your music from anywhere!
settings.remote_access_error_loading: Failed to load remote access information
settings.remote_access_signaling_server_descripti: Signaling server in the cloud, hosted by the Open Home Foundation.
settings.remote_access_protocol_basic: WebRTC with public STUN servers (may not work in complex network setups).
settings.remote_access_protocol_optimized: WebRTC with optimized STUN/TURN servers from Home Assistant Cloud (works in all network setups).
settings.remote_access_encryption_description: End-to-end encryption using DTLS-SRTP ensures your data remains private and secure.
settings.no_group_providers: You currently do not have any providers that support creating groups
settings.onboarding_subtitle: Let's get you started by connecting your music sources and audio devices.
settings.onboarding_music_desc: Connect your streaming services like Spotify, Tidal, or your local music library.
settings.onboarding_player_desc: Connect your speakers and devices like Sonos, Chromecast, or AirPlay.
settings.onboarding_footer: You can always add more providers later from this settings page.
settings.remote_access_qr_code_description: Scan with your phone camera to connect instantly.
settings.reset_to_defaults_confirm: Are you sure you want to reset all settings to their default values? This will save the changes immediately.
settings.unsaved_changes_message: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to leave without saving?
settings.provider_requires_attention_detail: One or more providers require attention. Please check the provider settings.

web_player_enabled.label: Enable built-in (Sendspin) Web Player
web_player_enabled.description: Allow playback to this device/browser using the built-in Sendspin web player.

enable_browser_controls.label: Enable browser media controls
enable_browser_controls.description: Allow control of playback using the browser's built-in media controls (e.g., media keys on your keyboard).

settings.protocol_disabled_message: Enable this protocol to configure its settings
settings.protocol_no_settings: This output protocol does not have any additional configuration
settings.protocol_no_settings_with_advanced: No settings visible. Enable advanced settings to see more configuration options.

mobile_sidebar_side.label: Mobile sidebar side
mobile_sidebar_side.description: Which side the navigation menu (sheet) opens from on mobile. Default is left.

settings.add_group_player_desc_sync: Create a permanent SyncGroup with players that are sync-compatible. When you play to this Player Group, the member players will be automatically synchronized.
settings.genre_management_description: Manage default genres and restore genre defaults
settings.restore_missing_defaults_description: Adds any missing default genres without affecting your existing genres or custom mappings.
settings.full_restore_genres_description: Deletes all genres and aliases, recreates the defaults, and remaps all existing media items. Use with caution!
settings.confirm_restore_defaults: Restore missing default genres? This will add any missing default genres without deleting or modifying your existing genres.
settings.confirm_full_restore: This will DELETE ALL existing genres and aliases, recreate only the defaults, and remap all existing media items to the new genres. All custom genres, alias mappings, and media associations will be lost.
settings.confirm_full_restore_2: Are you absolutely sure? This action cannot be undone.
settings.restore_all_present: All default genres are already present.
settings.full_restore_success: Full restore complete. {0} default genre(s) restored.
settings.background_scanner_description: Automatically maps tracks, albums, and artists to genres.
settings.scan_already_running: Genre scan is already in progress.
settings.full_restore_failed: Failed to perform full genre restore
settings.music_providers_description: Manage your music streaming services and local libraries
settings.player_providers_description: Configure providers for your audio output devices
settings.metadata_providers_description: Manage metadata providers for artwork and additional info
settings.plugin_providers_description: Manage plugins that extend Music Assistant functionality
settings.genre_statistics_description: Browse and filter all genres in your library. Genres can be globally excluded and restored.
settings.excluded_genres_description: Genres listed here are globally excluded from your library and will not appear in any views.
settings.audio_analysis_providers_description: Manage providers that analyze your audio

sendspin_static_delay.label: Static playback delay (ms)
sendspin_static_delay.description: Offset in milliseconds to keep this player in sync with other players. Increase if audio plays too late, for example to compensate for latency from an amp, active speakers, or the OS.

settings.audio_analysis_description: Track audio analysis coverage across your providers

audio_analysis_concurrency.title: Background analysis concurrency
audio_analysis_concurrency.description: Control how many tracks are analyzed concurrently during the nightly background scan. This setting lives in the Streams core configuration.

settings.remove_provider_confirm: Remove this provider? This cannot be undone.

audio_analysis_failures.title: Audio Analysis Failures
audio_analysis_failures.description: Tracks that failed analysis are skipped on future scans. Delete an entry to clear the failure and let it be analyzed again.
audio_analysis_failures.clear_all_description: This removes all {0} recorded failures so the tracks will be analyzed again on the next scan.
audio_analysis_failures.cleared_one: Failure cleared — the track will be analyzed again.
audio_analysis_failures.clear_error: Couldn't clear failures. Please try again.
audio_analysis_failures.load_error: Couldn't load failures from the server.

settings.queue_global_settings_hint: These settings apply to this queue only. You can also configure the defaults that apply to all player queues.
settings.protocol_provider_unavailable: The provider for this output protocol is currently unavailable.
settings.protocol_multi_info: This player supports multiple output protocols. Music Assistant links them automatically so they act as a single player — enable the ones you want to use.

show_waveform.label: Prefer waveform progress bar
show_waveform.description: Show a waveform-style progress bar in the fullscreen player when audio analysis data is available for the playing track.

settings.diagnostics_description: View server logs and download a diagnostics report for troubleshooting

customize_menu.label: Customize menu
customize_menu.description: Put the navigation menu in edit mode to show, hide, reorder and rename its items.

auth.provider_filter_hint: Restrict this user to access only the selected music providers. Leave empty for full access to all music providers.

party.get_started: Play some music to get the party started!

music_quiz.create_intro: Create a new quiz game to test your music knowledge!

music_quiz.unsupported_description: This game type requires a newer version of the Music Assistant frontend.

not_found_headline: Oops, this page is off the setlist.
not_found_subtext: The track you're looking for got lost between providers. Head back or find something new.

smart_playlist.desc: Generate a playlist from your library based on rules.
smart_playlist.track_count_hint: Without filters, all library tracks are included. Adding filters narrows the selection.
smart_playlist.dynamic_sample_note: Songs change each play. These are examples of what to expect.
smart_playlist.empty_desc: No tracks match your current rules. Loosen a filter or pick a different seed to get started.
smart_playlist.no_filters: No filters yet. Add one to narrow the result.
smart_playlist.no_rules: No rules yet. Add one to start matching tracks.
smart_playlist.no_rules_desc: Tracks are picked from your entire library at random. Add a rule to narrow the selection.
smart_playlist.picker_empty_search: Type at least 2 characters to find a {label}.
smart_playlist.seed_count_hint: Up to 50 tracks from your streaming provider, refreshed on each play.
smart_playlist.seed_filters_hint: Filters are best effort only. Some music providers do not provide the necessary metadata to apply filters.
smart_playlist.seed_heading: Discover music similar to the following tracks, artists, albums or playlists
smart_playlist.seed_no_provider: No streaming provider supports similar tracks
smart_playlist.type_library_desc: Build it from music you already have in your library.
smart_playlist.type_seed_desc: Discover music via your streaming providers.

artist_no_library_albums: You don't have any albums in your library for this artist.
artist_no_library_tracks: You don't have any tracks in your library for this artist.
crossfade_explanation: Smoothly blends the end of the current track into the start of the next, removing silent gaps between songs.
crossfade_active_with_smart: Crossfade is active with smart fades.
crossfade_smart_active: The fade timing is chosen automatically to suit each track.
lyrics_unavailable_song: There are no lyrics available for this track (yet).
lyrics_unavailable_content: Lyrics are not available for this media type.
autoplay_explanation: When your queue runs out, additional tracks are added automatically so the music will not stop.
queue_buffered_explanation: This track is already buffered by the player to play next.
autoplay_on_desc: After your selection has played, Autoplay keeps the music going by automatically adding more content based on your preferences.
autoplay_off_desc: Your music will stop once the queue has finished. Enable Autoplay to automatically keep it going with more content based on your preferences.
shuffle_smart_active: Smart shuffle is on. Click to turn it off.
autoplay_dynamic_lead: Your queue is being dynamically filled based on your selection:
autoplay_dynamic_desc: Your queue is being dynamically filled based on your selection.
autoplay_on_desc_sources: Your queue is playing {0}. When it reaches the end, Autoplay keeps the music going by adding more content based on your preferences.
autoplay_off_desc_sources: Your queue is playing {0} and will stop once it finishes. Enable Autoplay to keep the music going automatically with more content.
shuffle_dynamic_active: Smart shuffle is active because the queue is playing in dynamic mode.
repeat_dynamic_unavailable: Repeat isn't available while the queue is playing in dynamic mode.
audio_overlay_explanation: Mix a looping ambient sound into this queue's playback.
audio_overlay_no_sounds: No overlay sounds available. Add a provider that offers sound effects.
